title: Outcome Complication
description: Generates a soft cost for a success-but-not-clean partial outcome.
entries: but it takes longer than you have
but you're seen doing it
but something valuable breaks
but now you owe someone
but it makes a noise you can't take back
but it costs more than you meant to spend
but you leave a trail behind you
but you have to give something up to do it
but it draws attention you didn't want
but someone else gets the credit
but the way you did it will come back around
but you're worse off for the next thing
but a friend gets pulled in with you
but you have to promise something you'd rather not
but it works only this once
but the truth of it starts to spread
but you tip your hand doing it
but you lose your footing in the process
but it puts you where you didn't want to be
but someone is watching who shouldn't be
but you use up something you can't easily replace
but it raises a question you can't yet answer
but a door closes quietly behind you
but it changes how they see you
